questions: What are key CTV and video benchmarks from Innovid’s 2023 report?
How do interactive/advanced formats perform vs. standard video?
qa.answer: CTV share of impressions continues to rise, with interactive and advanced creative delivering higher engagement versus standard video. Managing reach/frequency and creative fit are critical to performance.
implication: Use interactive CTV where relevant; monitor completion and engagement.
Optimize frequency and sequencing across CTV, desktop, and mobile.
Align creative to screen context; test interactive elements for lift.
